top.title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
top.summary: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.

top.title: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
top.summary: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.

top.title: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after issuing tsunami warning
top.summary: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week,

top.title: Elon Musk snubs interview summons by French prosecutors amid X probe
top.summary: The Paris prosecutor's office told the BBC it had "taken note of the absence of the people summoned".

top.title: White House and Anthropic hold 'productive' meeting amid fears over Mythos model
top.summary: The discussion is a sign the AI firm's technology may be too critical for even the US government to do without.

top.title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
top.summary: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
